targets.name: simple bird
targets.executor_readability_notes: Simple silhouette is paired with bird-base landmarks that expose midpoint and diagonal fold cues.

targets.name: simple fish
targets.executor_readability_notes: Simple fish target maps to visible fish-base tail/body landmarks for a one-step executor action flow.

targets.name: simple flower
targets.executor_readability_notes: Radial flower shape maps to waterbomb center and petal midpoint landmarks.

targets.name: simple boat
targets.executor_readability_notes: Boat target uses kite-base mast/hull landmarks and includes the two-finger-gripper optional profile path.

targets.name: simple star
targets.executor_readability_notes: Star target maps to frog-base point and center landmarks for structured checks and failure modes.

targets.name: known good triangle
targets.source: hand-authored SVG fixture derived from the Flat-Folder folded-state silhouette for the known-good triangle sequence
targets.executor_readability_notes: Triangle target is intentionally matched to a solver-passing folded-state silhouette so it can serve as a completed-result regression case.

targets.name: known good corner
targets.source: hand-authored SVG fixture derived from the Flat-Folder folded-state silhouette for the known-good corner-fold sequence
targets.executor_readability_notes: Corner-fold target is intentionally matched to a solver-passing folded-state silhouette so it can serve as a completed-result regression case.

targets.name: known good paper party hat
targets.source: hand-authored SVG fixture derived from the Flat-Folder folded-state silhouette for the known-good paper-hat sequence
targets.executor_readability_notes: Paper-hat target uses the same solver-passing cone silhouette as the folded-state geometry; decorative SVG lines are not part of the target silhouette gate.

targets.name: known good square packet
targets.source: hand-authored SVG fixture derived from the Flat-Folder folded-state silhouette for a two-step known-good square-packet sequence
targets.executor_readability_notes: Square-packet target has two backend-backed intermediate folded states, so it exercises real multi-step walkthrough evidence instead of inspection-only prefix states.

targets.name: generated triangle
targets.source: deterministic local generated candidate fixture derived from the Phase 16 generated-candidate recipe
targets.executor_readability_notes: Generated triangle is intentionally routed through the same backend-state, target-match, step-replay, and executor-feasibility gates as known-good fixtures; it is labeled separately from known-good tutorial sources.

targets.name: creative crane
targets.executor_readability_notes: Crane-like reference reuses bird-base wing and beak landmarks while testing a distinct silhouette.

targets.name: creative shark
targets.executor_readability_notes: Shark-like reference reuses fish-base tail and body landmarks with an added dorsal cue.

targets.name: creative lotus
targets.executor_readability_notes: Lotus-like reference reuses waterbomb radial petal and center landmarks.

targets.name: creative sailboat
targets.executor_readability_notes: Sailboat reference reuses kite-base mast, sail, and hull landmarks while testing a wider hull.

targets.name: creative sunstar
targets.executor_readability_notes: Sunstar reference reuses frog-base point, radial, and center landmarks for a denser point silhouette.
